title: Nom tres long pour faire un test avec la sidebar, je ne sais pas si elle va se r

messages.content:
The information about "OK" in the provided context is related to the **Koheras ADJUSTIK and ADJUSTIK HP** product guide.

In the Ethernet port configuration section, it states:
*"Click OK to accept the configuration of the new Ethernet connection port."* This confirms that the "OK" button is used to validate and save settings in the software interface.

sources.source: Karuseichyk - 2024 - Multiparameter Method of Moments for Sources Resolving and Characterization.pdf

messages.content: The "OK" button in the Koheras ADJUSTIK and ADJUSTIK HP software interface is used to **accept and save the configuration of a new Ethernet connection port**. Once the settings are entered, clicking "OK" validates and applies them.

sources.source: Koheras ADJUSTIK and ADJUSTIK HP Product Guide (1).pdf
sources.url: /documents/components/Koheras ADJUSTIK and ADJUSTIK HP Product Guide (1).pdf
